address.streetAddress: 126/2A, MANJRI Keshav Nagar Road, near SHIVKRISHNA MANGAL KARYALAYA, Shiv Krishna Society, MANJARI BK, Pune, Maharashtra 412307, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: My aunt she is a single mother of 2 childrens, her son was studying in grade 6 last year because of her job she relocated at another place, it is very difficult for a single parent to manage everything, she asked for living certificate and principal charged ₹15000 for a single document. It is pathetic making trouble to others and then not responding to her problem, not helping her only asking for a money which is not even necessary.

itemReviewed.name: S N B Ps INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL - KESHAV NAGAR

itemListElement.reviewBody: Good school for CBSE curriculum. Has decent school premises, experienced teachers guiding students in various aspects. School balances in studies and extracurricular activities.

itemReviewed.name: S N B Ps INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL - KESHAV NAGAR

itemListElement.reviewBody:
1.Infrastructure , classrooms, playground etc & other things are good.
2.Teaching staff is not experienced and not take revision of the students.
3.Studied chapters details is not escalated/scaled up to parents not even mentioned in the parent reference book which they provide,also the given homework is not mentioned in that book.
4.Student engagement activities is very less.

Suggestion - Please take the Experience teaching staffs with good communication and teaching skill and must talk politely with the parents.

Hopping for improvement.

itemReviewed.name: S N B Ps INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL - KESHAV NAGAR

itemListElement.reviewBody:
SNBP'S International school Manjri is one of the best CBSE schools in Pune. I am playing both the roles as an employee and as a parent as well.
Taking care of employees by providing them healthy environment is the greatest success of the school management.
Very supportive and good management. Accepting good suggestion and emplimenting them for the betterment of the school is one of the plus point of this management.
The teachers are amazing, the curriculum is second to none and each child is treated with care. My daughter is attending this school as well.
She absolutely loves the school and the staff. Her teachers are a great encouragement and and the academic program is great.  SNBP'S International school Manjri integrates compassion into their teaching standards, emphasizes the importance of values, and builds leaders through each of their classes and lessons.The teachers are  giving children more confidence when asking questions, engage in group activities, and opportunities for one-on-one time with the teachers.
Teachers are passionate about seeing their students succeed. They are so great about sharing moments of pride they see within your child – their good behaviors and achievements; and they know the importance of getting the parents involved should an issue arise, and do it in a very respectful, approachable manner.

Great team – great school!

itemReviewed.name: S N B Ps INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL - KESHAV NAGAR

itemListElement.reviewBody: The S.N.B.P's International School is a well-known organisation. The name in itself is a brand. The education provided over here is well designed to facilitate learning. The curriculum is designed to give a strong foundation. Learning at S.N.B.P's extends beyond classroom. The Management has always been welcoming to new ideas and executing them for a better learning. Teachers here help the students build their roots not only educationally but also help them build their personality for an overall development. The School has a very friendly environment with an effective infrastructure. If you are looking for an International school for your child this organisation is the best choice.
